milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17a — Overflow fix on Up Next + parallel list surfaces. Lesson title 'Claude Code: zero to your first session' was bleeding out of its .learn-item container. Root cause: the flex-column chain (.learn-zone-body → .learn-item → .learn-item-head) lacked min-width: 0, so the title's min-content width forced ancestors wider than the panel despite the title's own ellipsis rule. Added min-width: 0 at each flex level. Same defensive fix applied to .tool-card and .project-card (parallel flex-column card classes that could exhibit the same class of bug). No overflow:hidden at card level — would clip the warm drop-shadow.
